strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with a broad background in software, cloud, and infrastructure engineering.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the Founder of GISCollective, successfully building and deploying an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
AI experience appears relatively recent and hands-on, lacking the deep, recognized industry expertise expected of a Director-level AI strategist.
Previous roles are primarily at the Senior/Staff developer level, with limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption at a Principal level.
response.justification: Bogdan brings over 15 years of impressive, hands-on software and infrastructure engineering experience, complemented by entrepreneurial ventures and community leadership. However, his profile aligns more closely with a Staff Software Engineer than a Director-level Principal AI Strategist. While he possesses recent practical exposure to AI tooling, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise, advanced AI education, and enterprise-level strategic advisory experience necessary to drive high-level cloud and AI platform strategy for large-scale customers.
